nodes.name: 16 Leadership Principles (Customer Obsession, Ownership, Bias for Action)
Atlassian core values (Open Company No Bullshit)
Active listening and giving structured feedback
Data Structures & Algorithms (graphs, dynamic programming, trees)
High-speed coding accuracy (solving 2 DSA questions in 35 minutes)
System Design scaling (focusing on caching, load balancing, message queues)
Meta core values (Focus on Impact, Move Fast)
Autonomy and direct feedback loops (Radical Candor)
Clean code refactoring and design structures
Geohashing and spatial search coordinates index (H3, S2)
